_comment: Sponsor inventory. WPR ad ops fills these without code changes — the frontend hides any slot that doesn't have a `name`. Slot keys: 'title' (masthead), 'ticker' (above recent scores, cross-sport), 'standings:<conference>' (per conference, cross-sport — e.g. one Wisconsin Valley sponsor renders on football + basketball + hockey + volleyball standings), 'school:<school_id>' (per team page, cross-sport). Each slot is { label?: string (default 'Presented by'), name: string, logo_url?: string, link_url?: string }. To enable a slot, set `name`. Leave name empty/null to hide it. SAMPLE entries below have names prefixed with 'Sample' so it's visually obvious they're placeholders — WPR replaces with real advertiser data when a slot sells.

school:wausau-east.label: Wausau East coverage brought to you by
school:wausau-east.name: Sample Hometown Insurance

school:auburndale.label: Auburndale coverage brought to you by
school:auburndale.name: Sample Lakes Region Realty

school:edgar.label: Edgar coverage brought to you by
school:edgar.name: Sample Northwoods Diner
